title: Dusk's Levels
description: A player Instanced RPG style leveling system for mobs to increase difficulty in a fair pace
body:
this is a mod to add a leveling system to the mobs in the game 
with the aim of increasing the difficulty over time by changing mob attributes.

recommended to use with other RPG style mods.

## RPG Style
every mob will have a level based on your playtime in every world which affects the mobs HP and Damage

## Simple
no complications just download and play

## Visual
every mob will get a name tag which will be visible when you get close to the mob that shows the name of the mob and its level next to it

## Maximum Compatibility
this only modifies attributes of the mob which means this will work with almost all moded mobs and will not change any logic so you should be fine using this alongside other mods

### Any bug reports to my discord will be highly appreciated
